---
name: Task
about: Track a concrete implementation task
title: "[EPIC-XX] "
labels: ["type:task"]
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the concrete outcome.

## Scope

- [ ] Implementation.
- [ ] Tests.
- [ ] Documentation or status update.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The requested behavior is implemented.
- [ ] Relevant checks pass.
- [ ] Security, permissions, tenant boundaries, and compatibility were considered where applicable.
- [ ] Generated contract/types are updated where applicable.
- [ ] `implementation-notes/12-project-status.md` is updated if this changes project progress.

## Test Expectations

List the checks that should be run, for example:

- [ ] Backend tests.
- [ ] Frontend tests.
- [ ] Mobile tests.
- [ ] Contract/schema tests.
- [ ] E2E smoke test.

## Related Notes

- `implementation-notes/03-detailed-requirements.md`
- `implementation-notes/04-implementation-roadmap.md`
- `implementation-notes/05-github-project-breakdown.md`

## Notes For Codex

Work from the related implementation notes, keep the change focused, and update this issue or the linked pull request with what was validated.
